calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Asis for Erica Esparza.

Ms. Asis stated that she met with Ms. Esparza this morning and that Ms. Esparza gave a lot of notes from family and friends stating that Mr. Esparza lived in San Francisco at the time he went to Mexico in 2008 and the time he went missing. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Death with date of death of January 30, 2014 (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF DEATH
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To Apr-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Apperances: Anne Asis for and with Erica Esparza.

The Court expressed its compassion for the circumstances that Ms. Esparza finds herself in. The Court offers probate code 12401, given the lack of real evidence of death. Ms. Asis stated that there is no need for a probate to be opened or assets to be distributed and that the family seeks a death certificate.

The Court instructed Ms. Asis to file a further declaration, stating under penalty of perjury that Mr. Esparza was domiciled in San Francisco, information about their marriage and basic facts. The Court continued the petition to establish fact of death to April 16, 2014, in Dept. 204 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
